name: KARTHEEK G C R
bio: Passionate about building community platforms and showcasing local talent. KARTHEEK oversees the overall execution and direction of TEDxGCEM.

name: YESHWANTH
bio: Dedicated to seeking out stories that matter, YESHWANTH works closely with our speakers to refine their ideas for the stage.

name: NIVED
bio: Leading the development of the website and branding, NIVED blends tech and design to establish our digital footprint.

name: Vikram Sen
bio: Spreading the word across all media, Vikram designs campaigns that engage the public and build excitement.

name: Ananya Rao
bio: Ananya keeps the gear turning behind the scenes, managing event logistics, schedules, and live stage production.

name: Siddharth Nair
bio: Handling financial partnerships and budget compliance to ensure a sustainable and high-quality conference experience.

name: Meera Patel
bio: Meera organizes our team of student volunteers, coordinating on-ground operations to ensure a seamless attendee experience.
